recent_posts.text: Preserving history shouldn’t risk it. With Smart Yingxian Wooden Pagoda 2.0, Lenovo uses AI, robotics & spatial computing to protect a millennium-old structure in real time.  The future of preservation is intelligent. Read more:  https:// lnv.gy/48UhCH1  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Have you heard about our newest teammate?    Lenovo is proud to announce our multi-year global partnership with David Beckham!  This collaboration will focus on AI’s potential to drive meaningful change in sports, business, and more.

With renewable-powered data centers and Lenovo ThinkSystem servers powered by NVIDIA GPUs, IREN is building high-performance AI cloud services designed for both scale and sustainability.    Read more:  https:// lnv.gy/3OsublH  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology #TechTuesday
100. More. Days. Is it too early to be this ready? The excitement is taking over the Lenovo campus, and we can hardly wait for the world’s biggest stage.

With the Lenovo Auto AI Box, powered by NVIDIA DRIVE AGX Thor, AI moves to the edge enabling real-time decisions, personalization, and safer journeys.  The future of mobility isn’t just autonomous. It’s intelligent.  Read more:  https:// lnv.gy/3NB9rIh  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

India’s engineering talent is building solutions that go far beyond borders.  Satish Pratapneni, Director R&D, Lenovo India, shares insights on AI, sustainability, semiconductors & what it takes for India to become a global engineering hub.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

From flashcards to storyboards, creators are saving time and reinvesting it in creativity. With Lenovo Qira, AI becomes a seamless partner. The future isn’t just productivity. It’s possibility.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology #TechTuesday

Intelligence shouldn't just be powerful; it should be unmistakable. Co-engineered with Intel, the Lenovo Aura Edition isn't just a PC, it’s a proactive partner that adapts to your environment in real-time.    #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology #TechWorld2026 #AuraEdition

Inclusion fuels innovation. This #WomensDay, we celebrate the women at Lenovo who lead, innovate, and inspire every day.  Proud to be recognized by Forbes as one of the World’s Best Employer & Top Company for Women 2025.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

With Amit Luthra stepping in as One Lenovo Commercial Leader for India and Srinivas Rao leading the Infrastructure Solutions Group, Lenovo is strengthening a unified commercial structure across PCs, infrastructure, and services.   #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Pascal Bourguet and Fan Ho shared a clear outlook on India’s AI future: the momentum is real, and scaling fast.    From hyperscale data centres to enterprise AI factories, India is moving from AI curiosity to AI capability; they’re shaping the next phase of growth.    #Lenovo

At #LenovoTechWorldIndia26, K.Bhaskar Varma, Co Founder and CBO, NxtGen, explained why Indian enterprises are focusing on AI strategies that are flexible, production-ready, and anchored in measurable business impact.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

#LenovoTechWorldIndia26 brought innovation to life, from enterprise AI to gaming. From Lenovo AI at the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™ to Neptune™ cooling & next-gen experiences, tech was on display at every level. Smarter AI. Enterprise to everyday.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Lenovo is proud to be at AI Impact Summit 2026, Delhi.  Join us Feb 16–20 at Hall 5, Booth 5.5B to explore scalable, responsible AI driving real-world impact, from infrastructure to intelligent systems.  #IndiaAIImpactSummit2026 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Ashu Kakkar, CIO, L&T Technology Services, shared that in the AI techade, progress is defined by impact, not scale and driven by ROI-first, practical adoption.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Bhaskar Basu, Chief Partner Officer, Microsoft India & South Asia, highlighted how Qira enables One AI, Multiple Devices, a unified personal superagent across PCs, smartphones, and wearables that anticipates user needs.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

At #LenovoTechWorldIndia26, Sumir Bhatia, President – Asia Pacific, Infrastructure Solutions Group, shares how Hybrid AI is democratizing intelligence across cloud, data center, and edge.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Fan Ho, Executive Director & GM, Asia Pacific Solutions & Services Group, Lenovo, spoke on moving from AI experimentation to execution. Scalable AI must prioritize data sovereignty and hybrid environments enterprises can own.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Performance meets sustainability with the Beast.  Scott Patti, Vice President, Infrastructure Solutions Group, Lenovo, spotlighted 6th Gen Neptune™ liquid cooling—scaling AI Gigafactories while reducing energy costs by 40%.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

As Official Technology Partner of the FIFA World Cup 2026™, Jeff Shafer, Senior VP & Chief Communications Officer, Corporate Marketing Group, Lenovo, highlighted Football AI — from AI-powered 3D avatars for offside calls to Football AI Pro for real-time analysis.  #Lenovo

Matthew Zielinski, EVP & President, International Markets, Lenovo, spotlighted trust in the AI era, positioning Hybrid AI as the new gold standard, delivering intelligence everywhere without compromising data integrity.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26 #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Building the future is a team sport.  At #LenovoTechWorldIndia26, Team Lenovo and our partners come together to turn ambition into execution.  From silicon to cloud, we’re shaping Smarter AI for All—designed to scale, built to deliver.  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology

Steve Brazier, Co-founder of Canapii & an Informa Fellow, shares a reality check: Hyperscalers may be spending $100Bs, but SLMs & neoclouds are the enterprise winners. With Anthropic leading the charge, the techade of Smarter AI for India is underway.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26

The opening session by Shailendra Katyal, VP & Managing Director, India, Lenovo, redefined AI as the digital heartbeat of India. The day began by grounding global innovation at Indian scale, proving that smarter technology's mission has found its home.  #LenovoTechWorldIndia26

The footprint of AI is evolving, shaping what’s next. Watch how real-world impact came alive on Day 2 of #LenovoTechWorld26  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology   https:// x.com/i/events/20194 22935488876545 …

The footprint of AI is evolving, shaping the future as we know it. Experience its real-world impact on day 2 of #LenovoTechWorldIndia26. Live from 2:30 PM onwards.   #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology #Innovation

Day 1 of #TechWorld2026 brought together the minds shaping tomorrow, the gamers and the creators!   See you tomorrow for more action!   #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology #LenovoIndia #LenovoTechWorld #InnovationinTech

The wait is over. #TechWorld2026 is live. Bold ideas, powerful tech, and innovations shaping tomorrow. Let’s step into the future together.  Join us on 11-12th February 2026.   #LenovoIndia #LenovoTechWorld #EventKickoff #InnovationinTech

At #LenovoTechWorldIndia26, Amar Babu, President Asia Pacific, shares how enterprises are using agentic AI & hybrid architectures to drive measurable business impact with Lenovo’s AI-centric Solutions & Services. Register Now:  https:// lnv.gy/3NJncEa  #Lenovo #SmarterTechnology
